content.text:
<user_query>
Explore this repo for existing edge functions and intelligence pipeline capabilities. Focus on supabase/functions, supabase_edge_functions, backend routes that call edge functions, and docs in memory/ about architecture/blueprint/PRD. Return: 1) grouped capability map by business outcome (ops, finance, market, risk, automation), 2) which functions look production-ready vs partial, 3) best candidate capabilities for Free/Starter/Foundation/Pro/Custom tiers.
</user_query>
Exploring the repo for edge functions, backend integrations, and architecture docs.

Here is a concise map based on `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn` (read-only scan).

---

## 1) Capability map by business outcome

Paths are under the repo root unless noted.

### Ops (operations, SOPs, cadence, integrations plumbing)
- **`business-brain-merge-ingest`** — Merge.dev category-scoped ingest into `business_core` (workers: `backend/intelligence_automation_worker.py`, `backend/biqc_jobs.py`).
- **`business-brain-metrics-cron`** — Metrics rollups for the business-brain pipeline.
- **`merge-webhook-ingest`** — HMAC-verified Merge webhooks → deduped ingest events (`supabase/functions/merge-webhook-ingest/index.ts`).
- **`query-integrations-data`**, **`business-identity-lookup`**, **`scrape-business-profile`** — Integration/identity lookups and profile scraping.
- **`checkin-manager`** — Recalibration / check-in scheduling (warmup list: `backend/routes/health.py`; proxy allowlist: `backend/routes/integrations.py`).
- **`sop-generator`** — SOP / checklist generation (warmup list).
- **`email_priority`** — Inbox prioritisation from Gmail/Outlook metadata (cognition audit list: `backend/routes/platform_services.py`).
- **`gmail_prod`**, **`outlook_auth`**, **`refresh_tokens`** — OAuth and token handling for email/calendar.

### Finance
- **`cfo-cash-analysis`** — Accounting-linked cash / receivables analysis; batch mode documented in `memory/EDGE_FUNCTION_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md` (pg_cron).
- **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** — Runway, revenue panels, weekly brief, executive memo (documented in `memory/PLATFORM_TECHNICAL_BLUEPRINT.md`).

### Market / positioning
- **`market-analysis-ai`** — On-demand market SWOT / research (`memory/PLATFORM_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`).
- **`market-signal-scorer`** — Scores market signals from stored snapshot context (heuristic scoring; `supabase/functions/market-signal-scorer/index.ts`).
- **`competitor-monitor`** — Scheduled competitor diffs / alerts (warmup + deployment guide).
- **`deep-web-recon`** — SWOT + signals + attention rules; **repo copy** in `supabase_edge_functions/deep-web-recon/` (backend: `backend/routes/intelligence_actions.py`, `backend/email_sync_worker.py`).

### Risk / governance / diagnosis
- **`boardroom-diagnosis`** — Focus-area board-level diagnosis (`backend/routes/boardroom.py`).
- **`strategic-console-ai`** — War Room brief + ASK mode (`backend/routes/boardroom.py`).
- **`watchtower-brain`** — 17-point strategic map / extraction (platform audit probes: `backend/routes/platform_services.py`).
- **`intelligence-bridge`** — Watchtower/snapshot risks → `intelligence_actions` (`backend/watchtower_engine.py`, `backend/snapshot_agent.py`).
- **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** — Contradictions, resolution queue, strategic alignment (SQL RPCs referenced in migrations under `supabase/migrations/`).

### Automation / intelligence pipeline (cross-cutting)
- **`intelligence-bridge`** + Python agents — Closes loop from detection to actions.
- **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** — Central snapshot generation (also referenced by `frontend` via `callEdgeFunction` in `frontend/src/lib/api.js` → `/api/edge/functions/...`).
- **`warm-cognitive-engine`** — Cold-start / secret touch only (`supabase/functions/warm-cognitive-engine/index.ts`; `frontend/src/App.js` calls proxy).
- **`biqc-trinity`** — Parallel OpenAI + Anthropic + Gemini then synthesise (`supabase/functions/biqc-trinity/index.ts`).

### Onboarding / calibration (product surface)
- **`calibration-psych`**, **`calibration-business-dna`**, **`calibration-sync`**, **`calibration-engine`** — Psych chat, DNA scrape, post-chat sync, engine endpoint (proxy allowlist subset in `backend/routes/integrations.py` lines 45–56).

---

## 2) Production-ready vs partial (heuristic, from code + internal docs)

**Treated as production-shaped (full handlers, DB/API integration, or explicit product wiring)**  
`biqc-insights-cognitive`, `strategic-console-ai`, `boardroom-diagnosis`, `cfo-cash-analysis`, `market-analysis-ai`, `competitor-monitor`, `sop-generator`, `watchtower-brain`, `intelligence-bridge`, `calibration-psych`, `calibration-business-dna`, `calibration-sync`, `checkin-manager`, `email_priority`, `gmail_prod`, `merge-webhook-ingest`, `business-brain-merge-ingest`, `business-brain-metrics-cron`, `deep-web-recon` (implementation in `supabase_edge_functions`), `query-integrations-data`, `scrape-business-profile`, `business-identity-lookup`, `outlook_auth` (folder name `outlook_auth` in `supabase/functions`).

**Thin, infra-only, or explicitly placeholder / stub risk**  
- **`warm-cognitive-engine`** — By design: no business logic, 204 + env touch only.  
- **`market-signal-scorer`** / **`calibration-engine`** — `memory/PRD.md` (Sprint 29) notes reachable but **stub/mocked** behaviour in live audit context; code includes real DB reads but simplified scoring/progress semantics.  
- **`biqc-trinity`** — Heavy multi-vendor setup (`OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `GOOGLE_API_KEY`); reads as advanced/experimental unless all secrets and routing are production-gated.  
- **`intelligence-snapshot`** — Referenced in `backend/core/cognitive_context.py` as `/functions/v1/intelligence-snapshot` but **no matching function** under `supabase/functions/` in this repo (possible deploy-only name drift or missing source).

**Duplication / deploy risk (not “partial code” but operational risk)**  
- Two folders: `supabase/functions/` (canonical set, 27 `index.ts` files) vs `supabase_edge_functions/` (partial mirror + `deep-web-recon`, `integration-status`, `gmail_test`, etc.) — called out in `backend/ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md` and `memory/PRD.md` (merge-ingest sync).  
- Naming: docs still mention `calibration_psych` vs `calibration-psych` (`memory/PLATFORM_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`).

**Backend integration summary**  
| Integration | Location |
|-------------|----------|
| Edge proxy allowlist | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\routes\integrations.py` (lines 45–56) |
| Cognition audit edge list | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\routes\platform_services.py` (lines 313–325) |
| Warmup | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\routes\health.py` (lines 113–113) |
| Boardroom / War Room | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\routes\boardroom.py` |
| Intel → deep-web-recon | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\routes\intelligence_actions.py` |
| Workers | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\email_sync_worker.py`, `intelligence_automation_worker.py`, `watchtower_engine.py`, `snapshot_agent.py` |

---

## 3) Tier candidates (Free / Starter / Foundation / Pro / Custom)

**Repo reality:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\pricingTiers.js` defines only **Free** and **BIQc Foundation** (`starter`, $349); `getTierByPlanId` maps `foundation`, `growth`, `professional`, `enterprise`, `custom`, `pro` → the same paid tier. So “Pro” and “Custom” are **logical** upsell slots, not separate SKUs in code today.

| Tier | Strongest capability matches (edge + pipeline) |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| **Free** | `email_priority`, `gmail_prod` + OAuth/`refresh_tokens`, `warm-cognitive-engine` (latency only), light **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** via proxy where allowed, **`checkin-manager`** nudges — aligns with PRD free-tier scope (email-heavy, limited integrations). |
| **Starter / Foundation** (paid default) | Full **`biqc-insights-cognitive`**, **`cfo-cash-analysis`**, **`boardroom-diagnosis`**, **`strategic-console-ai`**, **`competitor-monitor`**, **`sop-generator`**, **`deep-web-recon`**, **`business-brain-merge-ingest`** + **`merge-webhook-ingest`** — matches `memory/PRD.md` Sprint 33 “BIQc Foundation” bundle. |
| **Pro** (if split later) | **`biqc-trinity`** (multi-model), deeper **`market-analysis-ai`** + **`competitor-monitor`** frequency, **`market-signal-scorer`** once non-stub, optional **`calibration-engine`** when promoted from stub. |
| **Custom / Enterprise** | Dedicated deploy hygiene (`EDGE_FUNCTION_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE`), SLA on **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** + workers, custom Merge categories, optional isolated **`biqc-trinity`** providers, governance around **`intelligence-bridge`** + `deep-web-recon` data handling. |

---

**Docs to read next** (architecture / blueprint / PRD):  
`C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\memory\PLATFORM_TECHNICAL_BLUEPRINT.md`, `PLATFORM_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`, `PRD.md`, `EDGE_FUNCTION_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md`, and `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\backend\ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`.
